Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared on behalf of Brayton Purcell LLP.
Jami Forgy, as wrongful death heir, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Marilyn Grant was placed under oath and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court Orders that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying personal injury - survival and wrongful death actions in the following proportions:

Estate of David C. Grant, Sr. - 0%
Rhonda Grant, as Wrongful Death Heir - 25%
David C. Grant, Jr., as Wrongful Death Heir - 25%
Richard Wade, as Wrongful Death Heir - 25%
Jami Forgy, as Wrongful Death Heir - 25%

Brayton Purcell LLP shall recover the sum of $1,189.00 as reasonable attorney fees & costs, leaving the net amount of $195,925.94. Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

The signature of Jami Forgy shall be sufficient on all settlement documents with any defendants in the underlying asbestos survival and wrongful death action.

Order Granting Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.
